tasks.label: Create Virtual Environment
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt

tasks.label: Initialize Database
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/backend && python -c "from database import KiberDatabase; KiberDatabase(); print('Database initialized')"

tasks.label: Run Nmap Test Scan
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/backend && python -c "from scanner import NetworkScanner; s=NetworkScanner(); print(s.scan_subnet('127.0.0.1'))"

tasks.label: Test EPSS API
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/backend && python -c "from epss_client import EPSSClient; c=EPSSClient(); print(c.get_score('CVE-2021-36260'))"

tasks.label: View Database Stats
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/backend && python -c "from database import KiberDatabase; db=KiberDatabase(); import json; print(json.dumps(db.get_stats(), indent=2)); db.close()"
